about.label: About the Project
about.heading: Connection starts at the cooking pot
about.p1: is a FEIN pilot project by the organization Mavka.Berlin.Volunteers in Berlin-Lichtenberg. In our open cooking and baking workshops, we create spaces for exchange, community and mutual learning.
about.p2: In the focus areas of Hohenschönhausen, Alt-Lichtenberg and Rummelsburg, we invite all neighbors – regardless of age, origin or life situation.

projekt.heading: About the Project
projekt.subheading: Background, goals and the people behind "Cooking Together – Growing Together".

begegnung.heading: Connection starts at the cooking pot

projekt.aboutP1: is a FEIN pilot project by the organization Mavka.Berlin.Volunteers in Berlin-Lichtenberg. In our open cooking and baking workshops, we create spaces for exchange, community and mutual learning.
projekt.aboutP2: In the focus areas of Hohenschönhausen, Alt-Lichtenberg and Rummelsburg, we invite all neighbors – regardless of age, origin or life situation.
projekt.aboutP3: Since February 2026, we have already conducted 6 workshops with a total of 180 participants — all fully booked. From Soljanka to Şekerbura, from mushroom quiche to pancakes: every workshop brings new recipes, stories and connections.

values.heading: What matters to us
values.subheading: Our workshops stand for openness, sustainability and respectful interaction.

valuesDesc.nachhaltigkeit: Conscious use of food and seasonal, regional ingredients. We cook with what the season offers and avoid food waste.
valuesDesc.vielfalt: Sharing recipes and stories from different cultures and learning from each other. Every workshop is a culinary journey.
valuesDesc.teilhabe: Low-barrier programs for everyone – free and without registration hurdles. Children, seniors, families and individuals are equally welcome.
valuesDesc.dialog: Creating meeting spaces – across generations and walks of life. At the cooking pot, conversations happen that otherwise wouldn't take place.

projekt.quote: "I came here alone and I'm leaving with new friends. The cooking was just the beginning."
projekt.traegerP1: Mavka.Berlin.Volunteers e.V. (in formation) is a nonprofit organization in Berlin-Lichtenberg. We are committed to neighborhood engagement, cultural exchange and social participation.
projekt.traegerP2: The organization was founded to bring together experiences from volunteer work in the neighborhood and put them into action with the FEIN program of the Lichtenberg district.

workshops.heading: Workshops & Dates
workshops.description: All previous cooking and baking workshops at a glance. New dates coming soon!
workshops.filterEmptyText: There are currently no workshops scheduled for this location. Please select another location or view all workshops.
workshops.newWorkshopsNote: New workshops are being planned. Contact us for information about upcoming dates.

workshopDetail.commonBring3: Your own containers if you want to take leftovers home
workshopDetail.commonNotes: All ingredients are provided. If you have food allergies or special dietary needs, please contact us in advance. Children are welcome when accompanied.

pilzkuchenHonigkuchen.title: Savory Mushroom Pie & Honey Cake
pilzkuchenHonigkuchen.description: Savory mushroom pie with fresh champignons and herbs, plus a sweet, aromatic honey cake — opposites that go wonderfully together.
pilzkuchenHonigkuchen.heroAlt: Neighbors cooking together at a long wooden table
pilzkuchenHonigkuchen.whatToExpect1: We will prepare a savory mushroom pie with fresh champignons, onions and herbs together. The dough will be kneaded by hand, the filling seasoned together. In addition, we will bake a traditional honey cake — golden brown and aromatic.
pilzkuchenHonigkuchen.whatToExpect2: Whether beginner or experienced cook: everyone is welcome here. We share recipes, stories and a meal together at the end.

pfannkuchenFuellungen.title: Pancakes with Fillings & Salad
pfannkuchenFuellungen.description: Fine pancakes with sweet and savory fillings, served with a fresh salad.
pfannkuchenFuellungen.heroAlt: Children excitedly kneading dough with flour on their hands
pfannkuchenFuellungen.whatToExpect1: Together we prepare thin, golden-brown pancakes and fill them as we please: with quark and berries, with minced meat and onions, or with cheese and herbs. Accompanied by a fresh seasonal salad.
pfannkuchenFuellungen.whatToExpect2: A workshop for everyone who likes to experiment — and prefers to taste right away. Children can help with flipping and filling.

khachapuriBrownies.title: Khachapuri & Brownies
khachapuriBrownies.description: Georgian cheese flatbreads from the pan and juicy brownies – a culinary journey to join in.
khachapuriBrownies.heroAlt: Freshly prepared dumplings on a plate
khachapuriBrownies.whatToExpect1: Khachapuri is a Georgian flatbread filled with a creamy mixture of cheese and egg — we prepare it together in the pan, without an oven. In addition, we bake juicy brownies with intense chocolate flavor.
khachapuriBrownies.whatToExpect2: A workshop that combines Georgian tradition with a sweet classic. Ideal for everyone who wants to try something new.

sekerbura.title: Azerbaijani Şekerbura
sekerbura.description: Traditional Azerbaijani pastry with nut filling – a sweet piece of the Caucasus to make yourself.
sekerbura.whatToExpect1: Şekerbura is a traditional Azerbaijani pastry baked for the Novruz New Year celebration. The buttery dough is filled with an aromatic mixture of ground almonds, sugar and cardamom and artfully shaped into crescent form.
sekerbura.whatToExpect2: In this workshop, we learn the technique of rolling the dough thin and forming the typical patterns with a fork or tweezers. At the end, we enjoy the freshly baked Şekerbura with tea and conversation.

pilzquicheZimtschnecken.title: Mushroom Quiche & Cinnamon Rolls
pilzquicheZimtschnecken.description: Savory mushroom quiche meets fragrant cinnamon rolls – an afternoon full of aromas for the whole family.
pilzquicheZimtschnecken.heroAlt: Golden baked mushroom quiche next to fresh cinnamon rolls
pilzquicheZimtschnecken.whatToExpect1: Together we prepare a savory mushroom quiche with fresh champignons, leeks and a creamy filling. In addition, we bake fluffy cinnamon rolls decorated with cinnamon sugar and a delicate glaze.
pilzquicheZimtschnecken.whatToExpect2: A workshop for the whole family: children can help with kneading, rolling and decorating. At the end, we enjoy everything together at a large table.

soljankaSharlotka.title: Soljanka & Apple Cake Sharlotka
soljankaSharlotka.description: Savory meets sweet: Together we cook a spicy Soljanka and bake a classic Sharlotka.
soljankaSharlotka.heroAlt: Neighbors cooking dumplings together at a long wooden table
soljankaSharlotka.whatToExpect1: In this workshop, we prepare two beloved classics together: a hearty Soljanka — a rich stew with sausage, pickles and peppers — and a Sharlotka, the famous Russian apple cake that uses few ingredients and is wonderfully moist.
soljankaSharlotka.whatToExpect2: A culinary journey through Eastern European cuisine. Whether you know these dishes or are trying them for the first time — here everyone cooks together.

meilensteine.heading: Project Milestones
meilensteine.text1: Funding approval by the FEIN program of the Lichtenberg District Office.
meilensteine.text2: Founding of Mavka.Berlin.Volunteers e.V. (in formation) as the parent organization.
meilensteine.text3: First workshop "Savory Mushroom Pie & Honey Cake" — 30 places, fully booked.
meilensteine.text4: 6 workshops conducted with a total of 180 participants. All fully booked.
meilensteine.text5: Website launch and building of digital presence. Planning of new workshops.

fragen.text: If you have questions about our funding reports, the project concept or the use of funds, we are happy to help.

teilnehmen.subheading: There are many ways to become part of our community. We look forward to hearing from you!

workshop.heading: Join a workshop
workshop.text: Our cooking and baking workshops are free and open to all neighbors. All ingredients are provided, and no prior experience is needed.

contact.heading: Direct contact
contact.text: The easiest way to reach us is by phone or email. We respond within 2 business days.
